shakshi: The player's first contact with Sulphera's register — through dream, before any earned access. Sulphera noticed the player before the player sought it.
An Asmodean crystal formed in the vision from the player's longing — real enough to briefly manifest
The crystal did not hold — dissolved by morning, the player was not ready to carry it yet
The player had sufficient alchemy training when the crystal dissolved — gate condition for recognising the dust's value
The player saved the crystal dust — primary reagent for Infernal Salve and the alchemical chain to finding Hypatia
The dust was swept away unnoticed — the primary alchemical chain to Hypatia is broken, 0009's imp is the only remaining route
The dream sequence of 0007 opens the Hypnotic Meditation perk gate
